name: source-frame-v1-template
template_usage: Replace example-source, declare every emitted channel, then regenerate the contract_id golden sidecar.

transport.bundle: One atomic OSC bundle per source frame: /frame followed by exactly one message for every declared channel.

hashes.algorithm: SHA-256 truncated to 128 bits, lowercase hex (32 characters)
hashes.contract_id: Canonical UTF-8 JSON with sorted keys, no whitespace and no NaN/Infinity, excluding top-level contract_id, golden_hash and expected_contract_id fields. The expected value lives in a golden sidecar.

source.description: Replace with a stable identifier and a description of the physical or derived source.
source.destination_independence: Channel names describe source-domain signals only and MUST NOT name or encode destination instruments or parameters.

stream_identity.stream_id: Random 64-bit lowercase hexadecimal value generated once per process start.
stream_identity.scope: frame_seq, heartbeat_seq, monotonic receiver state and the presence lease are scoped to stream_id.
stream_identity.restart_rule: A new stream_id resets receiver counters and lease state; monotonic comparison never crosses streams.

counters.frame_seq: Unsigned monotonic emission counter with no producer-side gaps; increment once per source frame.
counters.heartbeat_seq: Unsigned monotonic heartbeat counter; independent of frame_seq.

presence.expiry: After lease_ms without a valid renewal for the active stream, mark the source absent and invalidate all of its channels.

observed.meaning: Value is directly observed or freshly computed; confidence describes current reliability.

held.meaning: Hold-last value; confidence MUST decay monotonically while the value remains held.

invalid.meaning: No usable value. The wire value is the 0.0 sentinel and receivers MUST ignore it.

channels.name: modulation
channels.description: Example normalized source-domain channel; replace or remove it in a concrete contract.
channels.polarity: 0 = minimum observed source-domain intensity; 1 = maximum calibrated source-domain intensity.
channels.smoothing_hints: Consumer must interpolate or smooth this control-rate signal to audio rate before sample-by-sample use.

frame.atomicity: The /frame metadata message and all declared channel messages share one OSC bundle and the immediately timetag.
frame.completeness: A frame is usable only when it contains exactly one value/state/confidence tuple for every declared channel.
frame.invalid_rule: state=invalid requires value=0.0 and the receiver ignores value regardless of confidence.

handshake.rebroadcast: At process start, approximately every hello_rebroadcast_s, and whenever contract or producer metadata changes.

/src/example-source/hello.frequency: On start, approximately 1 Hz, and on change.

/src/example-source/heartbeat.frequency: At least once per heartbeat_interval_ms while no frames are emitted.

/src/example-source/frame.frequency: Once per atomic source frame bundle.

/src/example-source/{channel}.constraint: channel is one of channels[].name; one message per declared channel in every frame bundle.

producer_rules.normalized_values: Every channel value is a finite float in its declared range unless state=invalid, when the 0.0 sentinel is sent and ignored.
producer_rules.channel_names: Names MUST match [a-z][a-z0-9_-]* and remain source-domain concepts.
producer_rules.destination_names: A source contract MUST NOT contain destination instrument names in channel names or source OSC addresses.
producer_rules.state_required: Every emitted channel message carries one of observed, held or invalid.

receiver_rules.gating: Do not release frames until /hello contract_id exactly matches the locally accepted contract_id. Unknown or stale contracts are rejected and /hello/request may be sent.
receiver_rules.monotonic_discard: Within one stream_id, discard any frame with frame_seq less than or equal to the last applied frame_seq.
receiver_rules.stream_change: On a new stream_id, discard cached values, reset counters and begin a new presence lease.
receiver_rules.lease_expiry: After presence.lease_ms without a valid renewal, treat the source as absent and all channels as invalid.
receiver_rules.held: A held value may be routed only with its decaying confidence; the receiver MUST NOT promote it to observed.
receiver_rules.invalid: Ignore the value when state=invalid, even when it is numerically inside the declared range.
receiver_rules.interpolation: Apply each channel's smoothing_hints; control-rate values used by an audio engine must be interpolated to audio rate.
